primary_pain_point: Spending too much time manually aggregating feedback from multiple tools
feature_requests: Automated feedback aggregation; AI-assisted PRD drafting
open_feedback: I copy-paste from Intercom into a Google Doc every week. It takes 3 hours. There has to be a better way.

primary_pain_point: Lack of quantitative evidence for prioritisation decisions
feature_requests: RICE scoring from real data; Theme clustering across sources
open_feedback: I can prioritise but I can't prove my prioritisation is right. Stakeholders always challenge me and I don't have hard numbers.

primary_pain_point: PRD quality: acceptance criteria too vague causing rework
feature_requests: Gherkin AC generator; Technical feasibility checker
open_feedback: Engineering comes back with so many clarifying questions. I feel like I'm writing PRDs wrong but I don't know how to write them better.

primary_pain_point: No single source of truth for customer feedback
feature_requests: Unified feedback dashboard; Source deduplication
open_feedback: We use 5 tools: Intercom, Typeform, Canny, Slack, and email. The same customer complaint is in all 5 places but counted separately.

primary_pain_point: Roadmaps lack cross-team alignment
feature_requests: Cross-squad theme detection; Standardised prioritisation unit
open_feedback: Every PM on my team uses different metrics. I can't compare their roadmaps. It's a mess.

primary_pain_point: Search and retrieval of past customer data is slow
feature_requests: Vector search over historical feedback; Natural language query interface
open_feedback: When I write a PRD I know I've seen this problem before in customer interviews but I can't find the specific quote. Search is useless.

primary_pain_point: Entity resolution: same problem described many ways
feature_requests: Semantic deduplication of feedback; Synonym clustering
open_feedback: 'Slow search' and 'results take too long' and 'search is broken' are the same problem. My tools count them separately. Frustrating.

primary_pain_point: Acceptance criteria don't match engineering expectations
feature_requests: Given/When/Then AC generation; Edge case surfacing
open_feedback: My ACs are always incomplete. Engineers find edge cases in planning that I should have caught. I need help being more thorough.

primary_pain_point: Executive stakeholder buy-in for roadmap decisions
feature_requests: Data-driven roadmap presentations; Quantified impact estimates
open_feedback: I need to present to the board quarterly. Showing 'customer said X' is not enough. I need 'N customers mentioned X, representing Y% of ARR'.

primary_pain_point: Time to first PRD draft is too long
feature_requests: PRD template with pre-populated data; Automated first draft
open_feedback: It takes me 2 days to write a PRD. I have 4 features in my backlog. I can't keep up.

primary_pain_point: Missing non-functional requirements in PRDs
feature_requests: NFR checklist auto-population; Performance SLO suggestions
open_feedback: I always forget to specify performance and security requirements. Engineering has to come back and ask. Delays every sprint.

primary_pain_point: Feedback themes drift over time without re-analysis
feature_requests: Rolling trend analysis; Automated re-clustering on new data
open_feedback: Themes that were important 6 months ago may not be important now. I have no way to track how customer priorities shift over time.

primary_pain_point: Onboarding friction is top issue but hard to quantify
feature_requests: Frequency analysis by product area; Funnel drop-off correlation
open_feedback: I know onboarding is a problem. Every interview mentions it. But I can't say 'X% of customers drop off at step 3' because I don't have that data connected to feedback.

primary_pain_point: Difficulty connecting qualitative feedback to quantitative metrics
feature_requests: Feedback-to-metric linking; Correlation analysis
open_feedback: I have customer interviews saying search is slow. I have analytics showing search usage drop-off. I can't connect these two datasets.

primary_pain_point: Co-occurring problems not visible
feature_requests: Pain point co-occurrence graph; Dependency mapping
open_feedback: I solved the notification problem last quarter and immediately three other complaints went away. I didn't know they were connected. Would have prioritised differently.

primary_pain_point: PRD review process is slow and low-quality
feature_requests: Automated technical review; Pre-submission completeness check
open_feedback: Engineering reviews happen in sprint planning. By then it's too late to change the PRD substantially. I need an earlier review step.

primary_pain_point: No institutional memory of past decisions
feature_requests: Decision log with rationale; Historical PRD search
open_feedback: When a new engineer joins they ask 'why did you build it this way?' I have no record. Everything is in people's heads.

primary_pain_point: Roadmap communication to non-technical stakeholders
feature_requests: Visual roadmap generator; Jargon-free executive summaries
open_feedback: Sales wants to know what's coming. I give them the Jira roadmap and they're confused. I need to translate constantly.

primary_pain_point: Feature estimation accuracy
feature_requests: Historical velocity integration; Complexity-based sizing suggestions
open_feedback: My estimates are always off by 2x. I need to learn from past sprints but I have no tool that connects past effort to current estimation.

primary_pain_point: Feedback from different customer segments not separated
feature_requests: Segment-level analysis; Enterprise vs SMB signal splitting
open_feedback: Enterprise customers want different things than SMB customers. My analysis lumps them together. I make the wrong call for both.
